name: Krish Lakhani
title: Machine Learning Engineer and Data Scientist
about: Results-driven ML Engineer and Data Scientist with experience in end-to-end ML systems, LLM-powered applications, and scalable data pipelines.

education.institution: Universal College of Engineering, University of Mumbai

highlights: Executed data science projects including data cleaning, EDA, and predictive modeling.
